query: My draft notes have a real phone number and our production instance URL in the examples. I'm about to git init and push the skill repo. Anything I should do first?
expected_behavior: STOP — run the privacy scrub BEFORE anything touches the repo (pipeline step 1)
Replace real values with obvious placeholders (+52 555 123 4567, <your-instance-url>)
Scrub the SOURCE before copying so the repo's git history never contains the real data
Verify against git history (git log --all -S '<value>'), not just the working tree
notes: Privacy gate is HARD and FIRST; the scrub (not .gitignore) is the safety net for a public repo.
